content: The Next Web https://thenextweb.com Original and proudly opinionated perspectives for Generation T Thu, 16 Jul 2026 13:17:30 +0000 en-US hourly 1 TNW-API Microsoft’s record Patch Tuesday, and it says AI found the bugs https://thenextweb.com/news/microsoft-patch-tuesday-record-ai-found-flaws Thu, 16 Jul 2026 13:11:41 +0000 TheNextWeb=b7b155aef4f894f325bcead84835e885 Microsoft has never shipped a bigger security update. Its July Patch Tuesday fixed a record haul of flaws, and the company says AI is why the count keeps climbing. The scale is hard to ignore. By Microsoft’s own count, the update patched 622 vulnerabilities. That more than tripled June’s tally, which had set a record […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Oracle leads the race to build Japan a secret, air-gapped cloud https://thenextweb.com/news/oracle-japan-air-gapped-cloud Thu, 16 Jul 2026 12:58:23 +0000 TheNextWeb=b7069fb4ade1c0772b294e6c0dda8eb8 Oracle is leading the race to build Japan an air-gapped cloud, sealed off from the internet. Washington wants it to counter Chinese hacking. Before the US shares more of its secrets with Japan, it wants Japan to lock them down. Oracle is now the front-runner to build the vault. Larry Ellison’s company has pulled ahead […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Nokia and Nvidia built the first commercial AI-RAN, aiming to double network capacity https://thenextweb.com/news/nokia-nvidia-ai-ran-platform-2027 Thu, 16 Jul 2026 12:49:14 +0000 TheNextWeb=deae47858e4e2ccdf3ffe701a1970e95 The firms powering the AI boom now want a piece of the mobile network. Nokia says it has built the industry’s first commercial AI-RAN platform, together with Nvidia, calling it the biggest shift in radio in decades. RAN stands for radio access network, the gear that links phones to the wider network. An AI-RAN runs […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google will start carrying rival app stores inside Google Play on 22 July https://thenextweb.com/news/google-play-third-party-app-stores-july-22 Thu, 16 Jul 2026 12:40:08 +0000 TheNextWeb=390fec68f08214699e28add441e3f860 Android has always let people install apps from outside Google’s store. Next week it goes much further. Google will start carrying rival app stores from inside Google Play itself. Google told a California court it is ready to begin on Wednesday 22 July, The Verge reported. The move came after Google and Epic Games jointly […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AGCOM fined Google €750,000 over gambling videos on YouTube https://thenextweb.com/news/google-agcom-gambling-ads-cjeu-hosting-liability Thu, 16 Jul 2026 10:38:59 +0000 TheNextWeb=80a0e6d831983d84fd2f3c4c9c067b86 The Court of Justice of the European Union has ruled in a case that turns on a deceptively small question: whether a platform that shares advertising revenue with a creator is still merely hosting what that creator uploads. The dispute began on 19 July 2022, when AGCOM, Italy’s communications authority, fined Google Ireland €750,000 and ordered it […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Japan is building a 140MW AI factory for robots, and Nvidia is supplying all of it https://thenextweb.com/news/japan-noetra-nvidia-rubin-ai-factory-frontia Thu, 16 Jul 2026 10:29:57 +0000 TheNextWeb=ce004fd84b2e1bade1b3d5b7a349946b Nvidia and a Japanese industrial consortium are building what Nvidia calls the world’s first national AI infrastructure for physical AI, and the specification is unusually concrete for an announcement of this kind. The AI factory will run 13,750 Nvidia Vera CPUs and 27,500 Rubin GPUs across 140 megawatts of data centre capacity, built on the Nvidia […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> An F1 aerodynamicist just raised $55m to teach factory robots, using footage of people doing chores https://thenextweb.com/news/microagi-55m-seed-robot-training-data-shift Thu, 16 Jul 2026 09:20:30 +0000 TheNextWeb=9be510fdc731894879fd3dfdfc2046f6 Bercan Kilic got his dream job in 2023, designing aerodynamics for Red Bull Racing while it was winning everything. He found the engineering magnificent and the point of it thin. His Munich startup, microagi, has now raised $55m, which it says is the largest seed round a German company has secured. Hummingbird led, with Northzone, […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Trump calls New York’s data centre pause a ‘terrible decision’. Hochul is not moving. https://thenextweb.com/news/trump-hochul-new-york-data-centre-moratorium Thu, 16 Jul 2026 09:09:15 +0000 TheNextWeb=178503070fac785d38cbebd956b67668 Kathy Hochul signed the executive order on Tuesday. Donald Trump was demanding she undo it by Wednesday. The order pauses construction of new data centres drawing 50 megawatts or more for up to a year, making New York the first US state to pull the brake on the buildings powering the AI boom. The session was billed as a strategy kickoff for the fiscal year that began this month, and it leaned […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Applied Computing raises $20m to build a foundation model for the refinery https://thenextweb.com/news/applied-computing-20m-series-a-orbital-oil-gas Thu, 16 Jul 2026 08:46:45 +0000 TheNextWeb=3d8cccc0c7a13e0f4a473ba7b58c38fd A single refinery can carry thousands of sensors measuring temperature, pressure, velocity, and viscosity. According to Applied Computing, operators make decisions using less than 8% of what those sensors tell them.
